name: Long March 10
description: Long March 10 (Chang Zheng 10) is a Chinese crewed-lunar launch vehicle under development by CASC, designed to support China's planned crewed Moon landings in the late 2020s. It uses YF-100K kerosene/LOX engines with a three-stage configuration and optional boosters to send the Mengzhou crew spacecraft and Lanyue lunar lander toward the Moon.
